title: Shared App Behavior Defaults Roadmap Template Placeholder

content.title: Purpose
content.body: Would guide planning for reusable governed App Behavior defaults and shared specs.

content.title: Already Decision-Complete
content.body: The UX system recognizes shared specs and defaults as reusable App Behavior authority.

content.title: Needs Clarity
content.body: Needs review of shared-spec/default model docs to distinguish defaults, shared specs, and target-specific behavior.

content.title: Authority To Review
content.body: Review agent/ux-system/20-model/app-behavior-shared-specs/README.doc.json and app-behavior-defaults guidance before promotion.

content.title: Promotion Criteria
content.body: Promote when real shared-default planning repeats and the roadmap can prevent duplicate local behavior docs.

content.title: Possible Outcomes
content.body: Promote, merge into App Behavior roadmap, keep as appendix, or delete.
